query:
SELECT 
  p.id as partner_id,
  p.name as partner_name,
  pc.city_name,
  pc.id as partner_city_id,
  COUNT(o.id) as order_count
FROM partners p
LEFT JOIN partner_cities pc ON p.id = pc.partner_id
LEFT JOIN orders o ON pc.city_name = o.city
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, pc.city_name, pc.id
ORDER BY p.id, pc.city_name;
